title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data for physical AI applications. The company released Vera as a CPU layer for AI agents and the Isaac GR00T reference humanoid robot. Together these form a complete physical AI stack enabling robots to perceive, plan, and act in the real world.
